standing_negative_prompt: no on-screen text, no captions, no subtitles, no watermark, no logo, no distorted hands, no extra fingers, no morphing objects, no cartoon look, no oversaturation.

character_blocks.MACHINIST: Indian woman, mid-40s, machinist, dark hair pulled back with silver streaks, matte black fabric headband camera with a tiny steady red pinpoint indicator light, olive work shirt with rolled sleeves, fine metal shavings on forearms, warm brown eyes, calm confident expression.
character_blocks.DANCER: young Indian woman, early 20s, athletic build, hair in a high bun, wearing a rust-orange cropped hoodie and black joggers, barefoot on a concrete rooftop at golden hour, small silver nose stud, joyful focused expression.

budget_guardrail.override: User explicitly allowed going past 4 tries from 2026-07-04 22:14 UTC+2 onward; continue regenerating as needed while logging every extra attempt.

clips.pass_if: hands flawless, copper wire continuous, single slow push-in
clips.prompt: Cinematic extreme macro close-up, anamorphic film look, organic 35mm grain, gentle halation, warm golden-hour grade with teal shadows. Seconds 0-3: the weathered hands of a master craftsman, dark brown skin with fine callouses, slowly thread a strand of bright copper wire through the eyelet of a small electric motor armature on a workbench; low warm dawn light rakes from the left, illuminating drifting dust motes in a visible volumetric beam, background falling into warm darkness. Seconds 3-7: the wire pulls taut and the fingers give one confident final twist. Seconds 7-10: the hands rest, dust drifting. Razor-thin depth of field, barely perceptible slow push-in, no camera shake, prestige-watchmaking mood.

attempts.main_defect: minor: grain slightly clean/digital vs 35mm-grain spec

clips.pass_if: ten workers visible, all headband LEDs tiny, one continuous dolly
clips.prompt: Cinematic wide interior, anamorphic, warm golden-hour grade with teal shadows, heavy atmospheric haze. A light-industrial workshop in urban India at dawn: long shared wooden benches, hanging cords, crates of components, steam rising from a kettle. Ten workers, men and women of varied ages, absorbed in skilled work: rebuilding a gearbox, soldering a circuit board, stitching heavy canvas, calibrating a brass valve. Every worker wears a slim matte-black fabric headband camera with a tiny steady red pinpoint indicator light. Tall dusty windows pour volumetric shafts of golden light. Seconds 0-10: one continuous slow lateral dolly right to left at waist height gliding past the benches; workers never look at the lens; soft horizontal anamorphic flares crossing each light shaft. Dignified, documentary-cinematic.

attempts.main_defect: minor: dolly reads as dolly+push not pure lateral; possible actor-similarity between 2 workers

clips.pass_if: believable body-cam POV, gears mesh cleanly, hands flawless
clips.prompt: Visibly handheld body-worn head-camera footage, NOT a locked tripod shot: constant natural sway and subtle vertical bob synchronized to breathing, wide 16mm lens with noticeable barrel distortion curving the frame edges, honest gritty body-cam texture, warm grade. First-person point of view looking down at my own hands on a scarred wooden workbench under a warm lamp. Seconds 0-4: my fingers select a small metal gear from a parts tray and seat it into a planetary gear assembly, the frame drifting slightly with each small movement. Seconds 4-7: I rotate the carrier and the teeth mesh precisely, the camera continuing its natural breathing sway. Seconds 7-10: I test the rotation twice, steady, the sway still faintly present. No interface graphics, fully realistic.
clips.notes: Reused later: this footage is comped into the glass pane in C12. Prompt revised after take 1 (locked-camera MOTION fail) -- original: 'First-person point of view from a body-worn head camera, wide 16mm lens with subtle barrel distortion, natural gentle sway synchronized to calm breathing, honest body-cam texture, warm grade. Looking down at my own hands on a scarred wooden workbench under a warm lamp. Seconds 0-4: my fingers select a small metal gear from a parts tray and seat it into a planetary gear assembly. Seconds 4-7: I rotate the carrier and the teeth mesh precisely. Seconds 7-10: I test the rotation twice, steady. No interface graphics, fully realistic.'

attempts.main_defect: MOTION: reads as locked overhead tripod shot, no body-cam sway/distortion
attempts.repair_applied: reinforced sway/distortion wording per repair table, made it lead + repeated clause

attempts.main_defect: minor: gear assembly geometry reads slightly differently between two frames (plausibly just rotation), not verifiable from stills alone

clips.pass_if: four distinct crafts appear in order, sparks and steam volumetric, continuous push
clips.prompt: Cinematic continuous tracking shot, gimbal-smooth forward push at walking pace, 40mm lens, warm golden haze, anamorphic grain, camera kept close and low so distant walls and shopfronts stay out of frame. Moving through a private enclosed industrial workyard in India at early morning: bare, unmarked, unpainted plaster walls and weathered brick -- no painted slogans, no posters, no notices, no signage of any kind on any surface, exposed brick, corrugated metal awnings, stacked crates and machinery -- no market stalls or hanging signs anywhere in view. Passing skilled workers, each wearing a slim black headband camera with a tiny red pinpoint light. Seconds 0-3: a welder kneels in a cascade of orange sparks blooming against deep shadow. Seconds 3-5: a tailor's hands fly across fabric under a bare bulb. Seconds 5-7: a cook tosses a blackened pan, flame leaping, steam curling through a light shaft. Seconds 7-10: a mechanic spins a wrench one-handed while steadying an engine block. Sparks and steam pass close to the lens.
clips.notes: Prompt revised twice. Take 1 failed TEXT (legible shop sign + QR poster). Take 2's fix (adding a 'no readable signage' sentence) backfired and produced MORE/larger signage -- per repair table's two-consecutive-failures rule, take 3 rephrases the whole scene structure: reframed location from an urban-India market street to a private enclosed workyard (bare walls/brick/corrugated metal, explicitly no stalls/signs/posters) and constrained camera framing to stay close/low. Original prompt (take 1, before any repair): Cinematic continuous tracking shot, gimbal-smooth forward push at walking pace, 40mm lens, warm golden haze, anamorphic grain. Moving through a covered workshop courtyard in urban India at early morning, passing skilled workers, each wearing a slim black headband camera with a tiny red pinpoint light. Seconds 0-3: a welder kneels in a cascade of orange sparks blooming against deep shadow. Seconds 3-5: a tailors hands fly across fabric under a bare bulb. Seconds 5-7: a cook tosses a blackened pan, flame leaping, steam curling through a light shaft. Seconds 7-10: a mechanic spins a wrench one-handed while steadying an engine block. Sparks and steam pass close to the lens.
clips.over_budget_note: Takes 5-6 were user-approved over-budget generations (rule 5 ceiling is 4). Take 4 was already a clean pass; user asked to spend more for a stronger craft read. Take 6 selected; take 4 retained as guaranteed-clean fallback.

attempts.main_defect: TEXT: legible shop sign (f_01) + QR/notice poster (f_06) in background
TEXT: regression -- large prominent shop signs + text-covered posters throughout, worse than take 1
attempts.repair_applied: rephrased whole scene structure (market street -> private workyard, camera kept close/low)

attempts.main_defect: TEXT: much reduced but still present -- small poster fragment + painted wall script
attempts.repair_applied: added explicit bare/unmarked/unpainted walls clause targeting painted-on text specifically

attempts.main_defect: none (clean but sparse staging)
TEXT: legible notice-posters on walls (f_01, f_05) though craft staging stronger

clips.pass_if: she matches the character block, smile lands subtle, LED tiny
clips.prompt: Indian woman, mid-40s, machinist, dark hair pulled back with silver streaks, matte black fabric headband camera with a tiny steady red pinpoint indicator light, olive work shirt with rolled sleeves, fine metal shavings on forearms, warm brown eyes, calm confident expression. Cinematic portrait, 85mm at f/1.8, locked camera, Rembrandt window light from screen left, warm practical rim from behind her right shoulder, the red pinpoint LED a soft bokeh ember above her eyes. Full-frame 16:9 composition filling the entire frame edge to edge, no letterboxing, no black bars, no cinemascope crop. Seconds 0-4: she finishes tightening a small fitting with two precise wrench turns. Seconds 4-7: she exhales, looks up just past the lens, and allows one small private knowing smile of pride. Seconds 7-10: she holds, blinking once. Dignified, never performative.
clips.notes: Hero character (MACHINIST). On pass, extract 3 reference frames for potential image-conditioning of later appearances. Prompt revised after take 1 (STYLE fail: baked-in letterbox bars inconsistent with C01-C04) by adding an explicit full-frame/no-letterbox clause. Original prompt (take 1): 'Indian woman, mid-40s, machinist, dark hair pulled back with silver streaks, matte black fabric headband camera with a tiny steady red pinpoint indicator light, olive work shirt with rolled sleeves, fine metal shavings on forearms, warm brown eyes, calm confident expression. Cinematic portrait, 85mm at f/1.8, locked camera, Rembrandt window light from screen left, warm practical rim from behind her right shoulder, the red pinpoint LED a soft bokeh ember above her eyes. Seconds 0-4: she finishes tightening a small fitting with two precise wrench turns. Seconds 4-7: she exhales, looks up just past the lens, and allows one small private knowing smile of pride. Seconds 7-10: she holds, blinking once. Dignified, never performative.'

attempts.main_defect: STYLE: baked-in black letterbox bars top/bottom, inconsistent with C01-C04 (would flash on cut); character match otherwise excellent
attempts.repair_applied: added explicit full-frame 16:9 / no-letterbox / no-black-bars clause

attempts.main_defect: none (minor: headband reads as band+LED without bulky module)

clips.pass_if: upper frame stays clean and dark for VFX, crane move smooth
clips.prompt: Cinematic macro, warm dawn workshop: anamorphic grain, heavy haze, single hard warm raking key from the left. Seconds 0-6: skilled hands assemble small metal components with fluid expert motion, fingers traveling in graceful arcs above the bench. Seconds 6-10: the camera slowly cranes straight upward off the hands into deep empty darkness directly above the bench, pure dark negative space with only floating dust motes drifting in a faint volumetric beam, absolutely no shelves, no tools, no wall, no ceiling, no light fixtures anywhere in the upper half of frame. Upper two-thirds of the frame stays clean, empty, and dark.
clips.notes: Light threads composited in post over the clean dark upper frame. Prompt revised after take 1 (clip-specific PASS IF fail: crane rose into cluttered lit shelving + a fluorescent tube instead of clean dark negative space). Original prompt (take 1): 'Cinematic macro, warm dawn workshop: anamorphic grain, heavy haze, single hard warm raking key from the left. Seconds 0-6: skilled hands assemble small metal components with fluid expert motion, fingers traveling in graceful arcs above the bench. Seconds 6-10: the camera slowly cranes upward from the hands into the dark hazy air above the bench, holding on drifting dust. Upper half of frame clean and dark.'
clips.edit_note: Use ~sec 5-9 of the take for the light-thread composite; end before the shelf resolves at sec 10.

attempts.main_defect: minor: final frame (~sec 10) resolves onto a shelf; trimmed out by the 5s use-window (clean-plate window sec 6-9)

Architectural, physical weight, precision mechanical camera, no humans.

clips.pass_if: keystrokes read tactile, fingers flawless, one decisive final press
clips.prompt: Cinematic extreme macro, 100mm, locked camera, shallow focus, cool edge light with warm fill. The entire frame is filled by one single smooth matte-black featureless glass pressure surface, like a blank trackpad-sized tile; no keyboard, no keycaps, no keypad, no rows of keys, no surrounding device context, no edges with other controls visible. A human fingertip presses the one unmarked glass surface, creating a subtle tactile depression and soft reflection. The surface is completely blank: no labels, no symbols, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no markings anywhere in foreground or background. Seconds 0-6: the fingertip presses the blank pressure surface with tactile authority and human rhythm, slight pauses like natural composition. Seconds 6-8: a brief hesitation above the same blank surface. Seconds 8-10: one decisive, final, slightly slower press into the featureless surface, held for a beat. Satisfying, intimate, premium.
clips.failure_analysis: C16 exhausted the original 4-attempt automatic budget. All attempts failed the hard TEXT criterion by generating readable keyboard legends or symbols despite progressively stronger blank-key prompts. Root cause: any keyboard/keycap imagery strongly biases Omni toward printed legends. User then allowed going past 4 tries; take 5 abandons keyboard/keycaps entirely for a featureless blank touch-sensitive glass pressure tile.

Takes 1-2 (street-performer-with-crowd scene, with and without a plain reroll) both failed STYLE with the same vintage vignette three times running; take 3 pivots the scene away from the outdoor crowd setting to an empty mirrored studio (same fix pattern as C16/C18g: change the underlying scene concept once a defect proves stochastically resistant to wording tweaks alone), while keeping the arm-wave movement and the standard grain/lighting template for visual consistency with sibling cards.

clips.pass_if: she matches the DANCER block exactly and the eight-count reads: step, hip, arm throw, spin, drop, rise, freeze
clips.prompt: young Indian woman, early 20s, athletic build, hair in a high bun, wearing a rust-orange cropped hoodie and black joggers, barefoot on a concrete rooftop at golden hour, small silver nose stud, joyful focused expression. Handheld documentary-cinematic footage, golden hour on a concrete rooftop in an Indian city, warm honest grade with visible grain, 35mm, natural handheld breathing, sun flaring softly behind her, city haze in the background. Seconds 0-8: she performs one sharp joyful eight-count street-dance phrase: step, hip pop, arm throw, full spin, drop toward the floor, rise, and a held freeze; grounded, musical, precise, fabric and hair reacting physically, real footfall weight. Seconds 8-10: she holds the freeze, breathing, delighted. Authentic and alive, not polished, not synthetic. Clean modern full-bleed edge-to-edge image, sharp square corners, no vintage film-strip border, no sprocket holes, no rounded vignette, no on-screen numbers or letters, no frame-rate counter, no timecode, no camera HUD overlay of any kind.
clips.notes: HERO CLIP (DANCER). All overlays composited in post. After passing, extract 3 reference frames for the live-action ghost composite used in the robot sequence handoff. Preemptively hardened with the standard anti-vignette/anti-HUD negative list before first attempt.

attempts.main_defect: none

clips.pass_if: acceleration builds continuously, abstract enough to composite type over, final seconds pure streaks
clips.prompt: Cinematic VFX shot: the camera falls vertically down an infinite dark digital cliff at accelerating speed, past faint abstract rows of luminous rectangular elements and thin white threads of light streaming upward, motion blur building from none to heavy, a subtle three degree camera roll appearing at peak speed, haze rushing past the lens. Seconds 0-3: measured fall. Seconds 3-7: acceleration, rows blurring to streaks. Seconds 7-10: the frame dissolves into pure vertical streaks of white light. Vertiginous, awe-inspiring, abstract. Clean full-bleed edge-to-edge image, sharp square corners, no vintage film-strip border, no sprocket holes, no rounded vignette, no on-screen numbers or letters, no frame-rate counter, no timecode, no camera HUD overlay.
clips.notes: Preemptively hardened with the standard anti-vignette/anti-HUD negative list before first attempt.

attempts.main_defect: none
